items.title: Apple's R&D spending hit 10.3% of revenue in Q2, up from 7.6% in Q1 and 9% in Q2 2025, amid the AI boom; Q2 revenue rose 17% YoY, while R&D jumped 34% YoY (CNBC)
items.title_original: Apple's R&D spending hit 10.3% of revenue in Q2, up from 7.6% in Q1 and 9% in Q2 2025, amid the AI boom; Q2 revenue rose 17% YoY, while R&D jumped 34% YoY (CNBC)
items.title_en: Apple's R&D spending hit 10.3% of revenue in Q2, up from 7.6% in Q1 and 9% in Q2 2025, amid the AI boom; Q2 revenue rose 17% YoY, while R&D jumped 34% YoY (CNBC)
items.title_zh: 在人工智能热潮中，苹果第二季度的研发支出占收入的 10.3%，高于 2025 年第一季度的 7.6% 和第二季度的 9%；第二季度收入同比增长 17%，研发同比增长 34% (CNBC)
items.title_bilingual: 在人工智能热潮中，苹果第二季度的研发支出占收入的 10.3%，高于 2025 年第一季度的 7.6% 和第二季度的 9%；第二季度收入同比增长 17%，研发同比增长 34% (CNBC) / Apple's R&D spending hit 10.3% of revenue in Q2, up from 7.6% in Q1 and 9% in Q2 2025, amid the AI boom; Q2 revenue rose 17% YoY, while R&D jumped 34% YoY (CNBC)

items_ai.title: ‘Without me, OpenAI wouldn’t exist,’ says Elon Musk as courtroom clash with Sam Altman turns personal — and exposes a deeper fight over who really built the company behind ChatGPT
items_ai.title_original: ‘Without me, OpenAI wouldn’t exist,’ says Elon Musk as courtroom clash with Sam Altman turns personal — and exposes a deeper fight over who really built the company behind ChatGPT
items_ai.title_en: ‘Without me, OpenAI wouldn’t exist,’ says Elon Musk as courtroom clash with Sam Altman turns personal — and exposes a deeper fight over who really built the company behind ChatGPT
items_ai.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 与萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的法庭冲突变成了个人恩怨，他说道：“没有我，OpenAI 就不会存在。”这也暴露了一场关于谁真正创建了 ChatGPT 公司的更深层次的争论。
